extortion.description: [AI generated] DAVIDYURMAN.COM is the official online store for the luxury jewelry and timepiece brand, David Yurman. Founded by David and Sybil Yurman in 1980 in New York, the brand is recognized for its signature designs that blend art, fashion, and jewelry innovation. On the website, customers can purchase earrings, necklaces, rings, bracelets, watches, as well as wedding and gift collections for both men and women.
